items.badge_description: Do you come from the land down under, where beer does flow, and men chunder? That's at least 450 different beers from Australia. Try 5 more for Level 91!

items.checkin_comment: Juicy, thick, rich and delicious. I like it. I like it a lot

user.bio: Travel for both business and pleasure. Very fortunate to have had some amazing beers around the world.

items.badge_description: Enjoying a nice Night Out on the town? Thanks for taking Untappd along.
It takes the perfect amount of light, the right framing and a touch of creative love to get the perfect picture of your brew. Now it’s time to drink it! That’s 170 check-ins with a photo.

Fresh from the tap is one of the best ways to enjoy a beer. Just try to use a glass and not drink directly from the tap, as tempting as it may be. That's 140 checkins with the serving style of Draft. Try 5 more for Level 29!

You may not be able to see through the haze, but that juicy, hoppy goodness goes down smooth. What started as a trend is here to stay. That's 315 different beers with the style of IPA - New England / Hazy, Pale Ale - New England / Hazy, IPA - Milkshake, or Pale Ale - Milkshake. Try 5 more for Level 64!
We believe in IPA and you should too. You certainly have a taste for the hops! That's 80 different IPAs. Try 5 more for Level 17! Want to learn more about this badge? Check out our podcast

You may not be able to see through the haze, but that juicy, hoppy goodness goes down smooth. What started as a trend is here to stay. That's 380 different beers with the style of IPA - New England / Hazy, Pale Ale - New England / Hazy, IPA - Milkshake, or Pale Ale - Milkshake. Try 5 more for Level 77!

items.checkin_comment: My type of boi. Perfect to cool you down.
